# Third-Party Code and Research Sources

No third-party source code is currently bundled in this repository.

`BrotatoRunTracker`, Brotato, ModLoader and installed Workshop mods may be
inspected as read-only research sources. Before copying any implementation,
record:

- project and author
- source URL and version
- exact files or algorithms considered
- license and redistribution permission
- modifications made

If no explicit license can be confirmed, only architectural ideas and public
interfaces may be reused. Do not copy or redistribute the source.
